description_long: This is a rectangular filing cabinet with a dark frame and a grid of 20 small, square drawers on the front, each featuring a small, metallic knob and a label holder. The drawers are arranged in four rows and five columns, giving the cabinet a highly organized appearance. The front face is a warm, reddish-brown wood tone, contrasting with the dark, likely metal or painted wood sides, top, and back. The handles and label holders on each drawer suggest it is designed for easy access and cataloging of documents or small items. The back and sides are plain and solid, with no visible openings or features. This type of cabinet is commonly found in offices, archives, or libraries for systematic storage and retrieval.
description: A rectangular, dark-framed filing cabinet with 20 small, wood-toned drawers, each featuring a knob and label holder. The design is organized and functional, ideal for document or item storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing 20 square drawers with knobs and label holders in a 4x5 grid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark-colored side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned dark back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid, dark surface.
